title: Fix the fd leaking to aardvark-dns.
body:
The openDirectory function is missing the unix.O_CLOEXEC flag. As a result, this file descriptor can leak into the aardvark-dns process which can then block the umount of rootfs - in this case, the umount fails with "Device or Resource busy" error message.

This commits adds the unix.O_CLOEXEC to unix.Open call, resulting in this fd to be closed on aardvark-dns exec.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
> LGTM
> 
> FYI when I asked for a separated commit I didn't mean a new PR, just a commit as part of the same PR would have been fine as well. Either way separate PR works too.
> 
> Also your commit message does not make it quite clear but we leak the fd into all child processes, it just happens so that aardvark-dns is a long running process where we notice the issue but I am good to merge like this.
> 
> @giuseppe PTAL

Uh, sorry for that. I've misread your comment in the other PR...
LGTM but defer to @giuseppe for final merge
